title: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts
description: CiteVahti runs unit tests on manuscript claims: it checks whether each cited source actually supports the claim it is attached to. Human-first and blinded (the researcher rates first; an AI second rating is revealed only afterward; disagreements are adjudicated by the human), with a hash-chained audit trail and decision-gated, undoable Zotero write-back. Local-first and single-user; it surfaces evidence for human adjudication and never issues a verdict, certifies a manuscript, or writes silently.
